tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or prediabetes. Chloride is slightly high and total CO₂ is mildly low, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and follow-up of glycemic status are recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Conan Doyle Medical Centre
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
